title: Ali's Visit to 'A'ishah and the Punishment He Ordered for Those Who Offended Her
description: Ordered for Those Who Offended Her According to al-Sari (in writing-Shu'ayb-Sayf-Muhammad and Talhah: On Monday 'Ali entered al-Basrah, went to the mosque, and prayed there. Then he went into al-Basrah itself, and the people came to him. Later he went to `A'ishah on his shemule. When he arrived at the house of 'Abdallah b. Khalaf-the

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
